title: Massive sell-offs in tech stocks over fears of AI valuations and Fed policy
summary: Investors flee artificial intelligence stocks amid rising costs and the Federal Reserve's restrictive stance, causing a plunge in Wall Street futures.

title: SpaceX loses hundreds of billions in market value after stock market debut
summary: SpaceX shares plummet up to 16%, erasing much of the gains after its IPO and wiping out more than $600 billion in value.

title: Progress in US-Iran talks drives oil prices down
summary: The lifting of sanctions on Iranian oil and diplomatic progress ease tensions in the Gulf, as hundreds of vessels await passage through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Asian stocks fall on interest rate fears and profit-taking
summary: Asia-Pacific markets post widespread losses amid uncertainty over monetary policy and weak Japanese PMI.

title: European markets decline, dragged down by tech crash
summary: Ibex, Dax, and FTSE 100 turn red after global sell-off in tech stocks and doubts about the Fed.

title: Kevin Warsh's new Fed surprises markets with a tougher stance
summary: The Federal Reserve chairman creates uncertainty by not clarifying future rate hikes, widening the gap in markets.

title: Heineken appoints Rafael Oliveira as new CEO
summary: The brewer picks the executive from JDE Peet's to boost sales in a competitive market.

title: Bank of England eases rules for stablecoins after industry complaints
summary: The British regulator softens its initial proposal and sets an issuance limit of £40 billion.

title: NatPower and Tesla reach agreement for a $5 billion battery storage plan
summary: The first phase of the energy storage project will be developed with the collaboration of both companies.

title: Alan Greenspan, former Federal Reserve chairman, dies
summary: The legendary central banker, known as 'the oracle of the Fed,' dies leaving a legacy of monetary policy.

title: Apollo's flagship private credit fund receives 17% redemption requests
summary: Apollo Global Management faces high demand for redemptions, fulfilling less than 30% of requests in the second quarter.

title: Keir Starmer faces criticism for his political management and its impact on markets
summary: The Labour leader yields to Burnham amid doubts about his leadership and market confidence in the UK.

title: Ibex 35 accelerates falls and erases record on tech sell-off
summary: The Spanish index loses 0.9% dragged by tech stocks and global risk aversion.

title: Jim Cramer recommends AI chip stocks and questions Alphabet over competitors
summary: The analyst points to a semiconductor stock as the best AI play, while doubting Alphabet's efforts.

title: China unveils world's fastest supercomputer and bans rare earth exports
summary: The Asian country surpasses the US in high-speed computing and uses its critical mineral dominance as a geopolitical tool.

title: Energy companies close strategic deals amid transition
summary: Energy Transfer signs new contracts while Chevron ventures into power generation with an AI deal with Microsoft.

title: Intel CEO offers realistic view on company challenges
summary: The executive acknowledges difficulties in the semiconductor market and the need for restructuring.

title: Renewable energy group plans largest IPO in China in four years
summary: The company seeks to raise $3.6 billion in the country's largest IPO since 2022.

title: Former Trump advisor makes bold bet on Bitcoin
summary: The ex-White House aide recommends investing in the cryptocurrency as a hedge against inflation.

title: Google falls 6% after departure of two key AI researchers
summary: The departure of the AI experts creates uncertainty about the company's innovation capabilities.
